title: Can I Go Off-Grid with Solar?
description: Going off-grid usually requires a larger solar system, significant battery storage, and backup planning.
quickAnswer: You can go off-grid with solar, but it is much more expensive and complex than a standard grid-tied system.

faqs.question: Is off-grid cheaper?
faqs.answer: Usually no. Grid-tied solar is often more cost-effective for homes already connected to reliable utility service.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy homeowner solar resources
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
